data.content:
Stale grooming handoff

Beat was groomed because it was stale.
Decision: drop
Rationale: The beat describes infrastructure that already exists in the codebase: the POST /beats/stale-grooming/ route, all three decision types (still_do/reshape/drop) in stale-beat-grooming-types.ts, an in-memory job queue with enqueue/dequeue, an async worker with health monitoring, and a status endpoint. The acceptance criteria are fully satisfied by the current implementation. This beat was never advanced to a terminal state after the work was completed, making it stale in the tracker rather than in value. No new implementation is needed.
Agent: claude-claude-sonnet-4-6
Job: stale-grooming-3
Repo: /home/cartine/foolery
Action: marked abandoned.
